base_includes: Vinyl siding panels (.044 gauge, double 4" or 5"), installed
House wrap (weather-resistive barrier) — ALWAYS included per IRC R703.2
Starter strip, J-channel, inside/outside corner posts, finish trim
Window wraps / trim (aluminum coil) — standard openings
Door wraps / trim (aluminum coil) — standard openings
Tear-off + haul-away of existing siding (1 layer)
Caulk, fasteners, color from standard palette
_meta.notes: All-in $10.50/SF × wall_area_sf is the customer-facing price; house wrap, fanfold, trim, and standard window/door wraps are bundled in. Itemized lines below show what's included (unit_price 0 = bundled). Real $-amounts live in add_ons. Prices are editable starting points — every company sets its own retail pricing.

items.description: Vinyl siding panels (.044, D4/D5) — installed, all-in (house wrap, fanfold, trim, standard window/door wraps bundled)
House wrap / weather-resistive barrier — code-required (IRC R703.2)
Aluminum window wrap / trim — standard openings
Aluminum door wrap / trim — standard openings
Starter strip, J-channel, corner posts, finish trim
Tear-off and haul-away of existing siding (1 layer)

add_ons.description: Upgrade to insulated vinyl (foam-backed) — additive over standard
add_ons.notes: Additive per SF over base vinyl.

add_ons.description: Upgrade to fiber-cement (James Hardie-type) lap — additive over vinyl
add_ons.notes: Additive per SF; heavier install, paint-ready.

add_ons.description: Rotted sheathing / OSB replacement, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
add_ons.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off.

add_ons.description: Oversized / bay / specialty window wrap surcharge
add_ons.notes: Additive per oversized opening beyond standard.

warranty_disclosure: Vinyl siding carries the manufacturer's limited lifetime material warranty (fade/hail varies by product) plus a contractor workmanship warranty. House wrap is included on every job as a code requirement (IRC R703.2), not an upsell. Fiber-cement and insulated-vinyl upgrades are quoted as add-ons.
